name: golang-github-klauspost-compress-dev
title: golang-github-klauspost-compress-dev
description:
optimized compression packages
This package is based on an optimized Deflate function, which is used
by gzip/zip/zlib packages. It offers slightly better compression at lower
compression settings, and up to 3x faster encoding at highest compression
level.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-klauspost-compress-dev because optimized compression packages.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-klauspost-compress-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-klauspost-compress-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-klauspost-compress-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
